ddls:
CREATE TABLE "signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal */,
  "start_bit" INTEGER /* Starting bit position of the signal */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the signal in bits */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value of the signal */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value of the signal */,
  "resolution" INTEGER /* Resolution of the signal */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the signal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the signal */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the signal is currently active */,
  "min_threshold" INTEGER /* Minimum threshold for the signal value to trigger alerts */,
  "max_threshold" INTEGER /* Maximum threshold for the signal value to trigger alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal value */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was recorded */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the signal at the given timestamp */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "alert_status" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the signal value has triggered an alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_values_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_values_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "ownership_company" TEXT /* Company that owns the vehicle */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_signal_values" (
  "vehicle_signal_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle signal value */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was recorded */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the signal at the given timestamp */,
  "alert_status" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the signal value has triggered an alert */,
  "anomaly_detected" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if an anomaly was detected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_signal_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_signal_values_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_signal_values_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal associated with the error */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error occurred */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "resolved_status" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the error has been resolved */,
  "resolution_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_errors" (
  "vehicle_error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle error */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal associated with the error */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error occurred */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "resolved_status" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the error has been resolved */,
  "resolution_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_errors_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_errors_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interferences" (
  "interference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interference */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal associated with the interference */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interference occurred */,
  "interference_type" TEXT /* Type of interference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interference */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "resolved_status" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the interference has been resolved */,
  "resolution_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interference was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interferences_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interferences_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_interferences" (
  "vehicle_interference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle interference */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal associated with the interference */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interference occurred */,
  "interference_type" TEXT /* Type of interference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interference */,
  "resolved_status" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the interference has been resolved */,
  "resolution_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interference was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_interference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_interferences_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_interferences_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, modify, diagnose) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
